channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics

item.title: Mace faces backlash over effort to ban new transgender member of Congress from women's bathrooms
item.description: South Carolina Rep. Nancy Mace faced a wave of backlash after introducing a resolution to bar transgender women from the women's bathrooms on Capitol Hill.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Takeaways from the AP's investigation into Osprey safety issues
item.description: After being grounded for months following a crash last November that killed eight service members in Japan, the V-22 Osprey — a complicated aircraft that flies fast like a plane but converts to land like a helicopter — is back in the air. But there are still questions as to whether it should be.
item.dc:creator: TARA COPP, KEVIN VINEYS and AARON KESSLER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: The Osprey's safety issues spiked over five years and caused deaths. Pilots still want to fly it
item.description: CANNON AIR FORCE BASE, N.M. (AP) — Over a New Mexico training range named the Hornet, two Osprey aircraft speed 100 feet off the ground, banking hard over valleys and hills as they close in on a dusty landing zone. A flight engineer in the back braces a .
item.dc:creator: TARA COPP, KEVIN VINEYS and AARON KESSLER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: UNT faculty slam university for removing references to race and equity in course names
item.description: Professors and instructors say the university is preemptively censoring itself after administrators removed references to race and equity in dozens of College of Education course titles and descriptions.
item.dc:creator: Texas Tribune, By Kate Mcgee, KPRC 2

item.title: Italian Premier Meloni's coalition suffers setbacks in 2 regional elections
item.description: Italy's Premier Giorgia Meloni suffered election setbacks in two regions as the opposition Democratic party won a tight race in the central Umbria region and deepened its control of the traditional left-leaning stronghold of Emilia-Romagna.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Pennsylvania Dem Gov. Josh Shapiro sides with state supreme court ruling not to count certain mail-in ballots
item.description: Pennsylvania Gov. Josh Shapiro came out Monday and sided with the state's supreme court over a ruling about the counting of mail-in ballots.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Georgia appeals court cancels arguments in Trump's bid to disqualify Fani Willis
item.description: A Georgia appeals court canceled next month’s oral arguments in President-elect Trump’s bid to disqualify Fulton County District Attorney Fani Willis (D) from criminally prosecuting him. Monday's one-sentence order from the Georgia Court of Appeals canceling the Dec.
item.dc:creator: Zach Schonfeld, NewsNation

item.title: Trump taps Sean Duffy, Fox host and former congressman, for transportation secretary
item.description: President-elect Trump has picked Sean Duffy, a Fox Business host and former Republican congressman from Wisconsin, to head the Department of Transportation.
item.dc:creator: Joel Rose, MPR News

item.title: Rep. Nancy Mace introduces Capitol bathroom bill restrictions
item.description: Mace is currently working with House leadership to include the bathroom restrictions into a rules package.
item.dc:creator: Joe Khalil, NewsNation

item.title: Amazon and Elon Musk's SpaceX challenge labor agency's constitutionality in federal court
item.description: Attorneys for Amazon and Elon Musk’s SpaceX argued in a federal appeals court Monday that the National Labor Relations Board’s structure is unconstitutional, advancing a legal fight that may last into the Trump administration where Musk is expected to oversee bureaucratic cost-cutting.
item.dc:creator: HALELUYA HADERO, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Bolton: Moscow, Beijing should feel ‘a lot of relief’ if Gabbard is confirmed as DNI
item.description: Former national security adviser John Bolton said that Russia and China should feel “a lot of relief” if former Rep. Tulsi Gabbard (Hawaii) is confirmed as President-elect Trump’s choice for director of national intelligence. “She’s not capable of doing it,” Bolton said Sunday on CNN.
item.dc:creator: Lauren Irwin, NewsNation

item.title: House committee demands interviews with FEMA employees about order to avoid Trump supporters' houses
item.description: House lawmakers want to talk to the FEMA employees who oversaw policy in Florida during Hurricane Milton recovery, as FEMA Administrator Criswell faces a congressional grilling Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Should women be allowed to fight on the front lines? Trump’s defense pick reignites the debate
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — President-elect Donald Trump’s nominee for defense secretary, Pete Hegseth, has reignited a debate that many thought had been long settled: Should women be allowed to serve their country by fighting on the front lines? The former Fox News commentator has made it clear, in his own b
item.dc:creator: LOLITA C. BALDOR, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Wisconsin Republican Eric Hovde concedes defeat to Democrat Tammy Baldwin in US Senate race
item.description: Wisconsin Republican U.S. Senate candidate Eric Hovde has conceded defeat in the race narrowly won by Democratic Sen. Tammy Baldwin, saying he will not pursue a recount.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, MPR News

item.title: US sanctions group that builds illegal West Bank settlements, with close ties to Israeli government
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — The U.S. on Monday imposed sanctions on organizations and firms involved in illegal settlement development in the occupied West Bank, including a well-established decades-old group that has close ties with Israeli leadership.
item.dc:creator: FATIMA HUSSEIN and JULIA FRANKEL, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Senegal's governing party poised for parliamentary majority in boost for reform agenda
item.description: DAKAR, Senegal (AP) — Senegal's governing party is poised to win a parliamentary majority as main opposition leaders conceded defeat Monday in an election determining whether newly elected President Bassirou Diomaye Faye can carry out ambitious reforms he promised during his campaign.
item.dc:creator: MARK BANCHEREAU, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Some Arab Americans who voted for Trump are concerned about his picks for key positions
item.description: LANSING, Mich. (AP) — Just a week after winning several of the nation’s largest Arab-majority cities, President-elect Donald Trump has filled top administration posts with staunch Israel supporters, including an ambassador to Israel who has claimed “there is no such thing as Palestinians.
item.dc:creator: JOEY CAPPELLETTI, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: All eyes on House Ethics Committee amid controversy over Gaetz report
item.description: All eyes will be locked on the House Ethics Committee this week as it weighs whether to release its report into Matt Gaetz.
item.dc:creator: Mychael Schnell, NewsNation

item.title: Trump taps fracking CEO Chris Wright for Energy secretary
item.description: Trump announced he would nominate Chris Wright, a donor and fracking company leader, to serve as his Energy secretary.
item.dc:creator: Brett Samuels, NewsNation

item.title: Trump picks Karoline Leavitt to be youngest White House press secretary in history
item.description: Leavitt will be the youngest person to ever hold the job and is expected to deliver press briefings based on Trump’s statement late Friday that he has “utmost confidence she will excel at the podium.
item.dc:creator: Elena Moore, MPR News

item.title: Handful of votes separate Las Vegas-area council candidates, echoing their primary
item.description: Just a handful of votes separated two candidates for a North Las Vegas City Council seat as of Tuesday -- a repeat from their June primary, according to the latest totals from Clark County.
item.dc:creator: David Charns, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Elon Musk responds after 'SNL' star claims he made her cry
item.description: In a now-deleted TikTok post, "Saturday Night Live" star Chloe Fineman said that Elon Musk made her cry when he hosted the show.
item.dc:creator: Darren Sweeney, Fox 5
